3042000.name: Timerift Raiders: The Past Awakens
3042000.description:
Dragons don’t stand a chance against a rocket launcher.

Think D&D meets Call of Duty. Or what if a Navy SEAL dropped into Middle-earth?

Enter Timerift Raiders—a fast-paced, single-player FPS where modern firepower crashes headfirst into medieval fantasy. Storm castles, slay orcs, and light up dragons with high-tech weaponry as you tear through ancient worlds in a mission that defies time itself.

  • Blast Through the Ages

Forget swords—you’re packing smart rifles, grenade launchers, and time-bending gear. Outgun spellcasting wizards, dodge dragonfire, and detonate ancient strongholds with a grin. Every fight is a cinematic showstopper.

  • Medieval Chaos, Modern Mayhem

From war-torn castles to cursed crypts, you’ll raid, blast, and obliterate your way through living legends. Skeleton kings. Elemental golems. Necromancer armies. Your enemies are ancient. Your tactics aren’t.

  • A Story That Hits Hard

You’re Ethan Walker—a special ops agent hurled into the past. You didn’t ask to fall in love with a woman from another time. Or become a fugitive hunted by your own agency. But fate has other plans.

Your mission? Rewrite history... or die trying.

 Key Features

  • Fast-paced FPS combat with fluid gunplay and brutal takedowns

  • Epic boss fights against dragons, corrupted warlords, and magical monsters

  • Cinematic, choice-driven story with twists, romance, and betrayal

  • Dungeon raids & castle sieges packed with loot, traps, and intense encounters

  • Smart weapon upgrades – customize damage, mag size, or ammo for your playstyle

  • A final choice that changes everything – stay in the past, or escape to the future

 Built for Bragging Rights

Clip your dragon kills. Show off your perfect boss run. Every moment is highlight-reel worthy- and your timeline is watching.

Welcome to the past. Locked. Loaded. Unleashed.
